evidence: The paper applies "random survival forest" and uses "random forest-based feature selection ('pRF')" for dimensionality reduction, employing impurity-based variable importance internally. However, the paper does not report individual feature importance scores, rankings, or magnitudes. All conclusions are drawn from predictive C-index performance ("median (IQR) C-index of 0.76 (0.66-0.81; p = 0.01)") and Kaplan-Meier risk stratification analysis ("log-rank p-values of p = 0.003, p = 0.001, p = 0.02, p = 0.006"), with rigorous 20-repeat 5-fold cross-validation avoiding information leakage.
